name: grief_calendar_reminders
description: Automated grief calendar — sends Telegram reminders on Ethiopian Orthodox memorial days (ተዝካር): day 3 (ሳልስት), 7 (ሰባት), 12 (አስራ ሁለት), 40 (አርባ), 6 months, 1 year after burial. No PII — only deceased name and memorial type.

trigger.notes: Runs daily at 08:00 CET/CEST. Checks all active funeral cases for memorial dates matching today.

pipeline: 1. Cron triggers daily at 08:00 Stockholm time
2. Fetch all funeral cases with grief_calendar_active=true
3. For each case, calculate memorial dates from date_of_death
4. If today matches a memorial date: send Telegram reminder
5. Reminder goes to: (a) begravningsansvarig, (b) church Telegram channel

family_reminder.sv: Påminnelse: Idag är {memorial_name_sv} för {deceased_name}. Kontakta familjen.
family_reminder.am: ማስታወሻ: ዛሬ ለ{deceased_name} {memorial_name_am} ነው። ቤተሰቡን ያነጋግሩ።

ceremony_planning.am: ⛪ ለ{deceased_name} {memorial_name_am}። ከካህኑ ጋር የተዝካር ሥነ ሥርዓት ያቅዱ።

steps.notes: For each case, check if today matches any memorial day offset from date_of_death
Only proceed if there are matches for today
Send bilingual broadcast to church Telegram channel (if ceremony_planning type)
